title: Saw these and
wikitext:
[]: Saw these and...             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Jun 06, 2011 6:04 pm ...thought of you guys... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Mon Jun 06, 2011 8:21 pm I'd bet EVA-01 would be pimpin' those shoes!

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Tue Jun 07, 2011 3:10 am Mmmm, yes, every time I see those or similar shades of purple and green, I am invariably reminded of 01. This is another example: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Jun 07, 2011 12:21 pm I've heard somewhere that Barney the dinosaur reached level 70 and evolved into Eva-01.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jun 07, 2011 5:54 pm Well, purple and green just look good together.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 07, 2011 6:08 pm Kendrix wrote: Well, purple and green just look good together.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Jun 07, 2011 7:00 pm Wrong. The opposite of violet is red. The opposite of green is magenta.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Wed Jun 08, 2011 12:08 pm Or if we are talking in terms of paint and not light: red is to green as yellow is to violet. Green and purple look good together because along with blue, they make up the 'cool' side of the color wheel.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jun 08, 2011 9:33 pm TehDonutKing wrote: Wrong. The opposite of violet is red.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Jun 08, 2011 10:56 pm according to the art class I was in: red and green purple and gold/yellow orange and blue

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Jun 08, 2011 11:01 pm Do these shoes come in 12/13 US?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 08, 2011 11:04 pm According to your color wheel, Freaky, the range of purples that get used for Eva-01 are complemented by yellows.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Jun 09, 2011 7:42 am Do these shoes come in 12/13 US?

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Thu Jun 09, 2011 7:52 am Do they glow in the dark like Rebuild's Unit-01?

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Thu Jun 09, 2011 12:20 pm I'm sure they're capable of going berserk as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Thu Jun 09, 2011 10:44 pm Give me God Mode and I'm sold. I needs to kick a bitch with my polygon feet.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Jun 12, 2011 3:34 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Dude... violet and red are right next to each other on the wheel. Unless violet is no longer a term that is used to label a shade of purple...

[]:             Quote Post by kyubei » Sun Jun 12, 2011 5:11 pm Everytime I see those colours I only can think on Yui...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jun 13, 2011 11:54 am TehDonutKing wrote: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Light#Electromagnetic_spectrum

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 14, 2011 7:14 am Warren Peace wrote: Give me God Mode and I'm sold.
